overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic vehicle through a dystopian industrial district at dusk. The player follows a white sedan through highways, overpasses, and narrow industrial streets with neon-lit infrastructure, shipping containers, and smokestacks visible against a hazy skyline.

events.description: exits covered highway overpass into open industrial highway with visible smokestacks

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway from under the concrete overpass, merging into light traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead on the wet highway

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass with heavy metal support beams
concrete retaining wall with colorful graffiti spelling BROKEN in green and red
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke against the grey sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with graffiti-covered walls visible to the right. As the vehicle accelerates onto the open highway, industrial smokestacks appear in the distance against an overcast dusk sky. The road surface is wet, reflecting the neon and street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial highway with distant manufacturing facilities

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed on the multi-lane highway, maintaining distance from the white sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan maintaining steady speed in the same lane

entered.detail: large overhead highway direction signs on metal trusses
hazy mountains visible behind the industrial complex

segments.scene_description: Driving along the open industrial highway with clear views of smokestacks and manufacturing facilities on the left. The white sedan remains ahead as the vehicle passes highway signage. Mountains are visible in the hazy distance while the road stretches forward through the dystopian landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with traffic control and bridge ramp

turning right at the intersection onto the elevated bridge ramp

agents.ego_description: stopping at the red traffic light behind the white sedan, then accelerating through the intersection and turning right onto the bridge

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at red light then proceeding through the intersection

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red then changing to green
metal and concrete bridge support columns at the ramp entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a traffic-controlled intersection, stopping at the red light behind the white sedan. After the light changes, the driver accelerates and makes a right turn onto an elevated bridge ramp. The bridge structure becomes prominent on the left as the vehicle ascends.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge with panoramic city skyline views

events.description: passing from open bridge section to area overlooking industrial port and waterfront

agents.ego_description: driving across the elevated bridge with views of the futuristic city skyline and industrial port below

notable_agents.action: white sedan continuing ahead on the elevated roadway

entered.detail: metal safety barrier with orange lights along the bridge edge
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Cruising along the elevated bridge with expansive views of the futuristic city skyline ahead and industrial port facilities visible below. The bridge railing with safety lights runs along the left side while the white sedan continues ahead. The scene transitions to reveal water views beyond the industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial port district with shipping container yards

events.description: descending from elevated bridge into ground-level industrial port area with shipping containers

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial port area, passing shipping containers and warehouse facilities while following the white car

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the container yard area ahead

large port cranes for loading cargo onto ships

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated bridge into a ground-level industrial port district. Stacked shipping containers line the right side while large port cranes are visible in the distance. The environment becomes more enclosed as the vehicle navigates through the container yard and warehouse district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alleyway under overhead conveyor structures

events.description: entering covered industrial corridor with overhead metal structures and neon lighting
navigating sharp turn through narrow industrial passage with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight industrial streets and under heavy overpasses, following the white sedan through narrow passages

notable_agents.action: white sedan navigating the narrow industrial route and tight corners ahead

entered.detail: heavy metal overhead conveyor or road structure with red support beams
concrete industrial building with stenciled number 050 on the wall
red neon tube lights illuminating the industrial structures

segments.scene_description: Driving through increasingly narrow and enclosed industrial alleyways with heavy metal overpasses overhead. The environment is lit by red neon lights and artificial illumination. The vehicle passes warehouse buildings marked with industrial numbers and navigates tight turns through the concrete corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from the shadows of a concrete underpass into an expansive industrial landscape that culminates in an ascent up an elevated bridge. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass with graffiti-covered walls, accelerating onto a wet road that reflects neon lights as industrial smokestacks emerge against an overcast dusk sky. As the vehicle maintains its pace along the open highway, the view expands to reveal manufacturing facilities and distant, hazy mountains while following a white sedan past highway signage. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows to a halt at a red-light intersection behind the sedan before accelerating forward. Finally, the camera makes a right turn, ascending a bridge ramp as the heavy structural elements of the overpass become prominent on the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an expansive elevated highway into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit industrial district. It begins by cruising along a bridge with wide views of the futuristic city skyline and port facilities below, following a white sedan past safety lights and open water. As the vehicle descends from the bridge, the horizon closes in, shifting the perspective toward a ground-level port district lined with stacked shipping containers and distant cranes. The scene then tightens further as the camera navigates through a warehouse district, eventually entering narrow concrete alleyways beneath heavy metal overpasses. Finally, the environment transforms into a dark corridor of industrial buildings and tight turns, illuminated by the glow of red neon lights.
